title: Incredibly psyched to see this news from our partners at @Verse_Eight!
message_html: Incredibly psyched to see this news from our partners at @Verse_Eight! ...
snippet: CROSS (@CROSS_gamechain): Incredibly psyched to see this news from our partners at @Verse_Eight! Vibecoded game creation was already on a meteoric rise, and this seed funding round will unlock a new level of growth and possibility for the platform leading open gaming in the AI age! Game x AI x Block
